summary: Iteration 13 testing: Medications/MAR, Body Maps, and Ofsted Readiness modules. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed (after fixing one MAR PDF rendering bug). Frontend: all critical selectors present, login + nav + Ofsted page (overall=29 INADEQUATE as expected) + Medication round + resident Medications tab + resident Body Maps tab on Leo (existing seed mark visible, click-to-mark workflow opens mark editor) all working.

minor.issue: Returns rows without filtering out witness-required meds for staff; UI uses sign-given without witness which then 400s. Not a backend bug per se - frontend should prompt for witness on Sertraline rows, or backend round response could include 'requires_witness' so UI can branch.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking sign-given on Sertraline row (witness-required) triggers backend 400 but UI does not surface a witness-picker or error toast. round-status pill never appears. Suggest gating the button or opening a witness modal.

After opening + Esc-closing Add Medication modal then clicking tab-bodymaps, bodymaps-content count=0. Tab switch may be stuck or depend on modal teardown. On Leo (no prior modal) the same selector works. Possibly modal overlay still trapping clicks. Worth verifying.

action_items: (REVIEW FIX I APPLIED) /app/backend/mar_pdf.py line 248: STATUS_COLOR.hexval()[2:] returned 'RRGGBB' without '#', causing reportlab to throw 'Invalid color value' for any MAR PDF that includes an admin record. Added '#' prefix. MAR PDF now returns 200 + %PDF-1.4.
Frontend Medication Round: when user clicks sign-given on a witness-required med, prompt for witness selection rather than silent 400.
Frontend ResidentDetail: ensure modal close via Escape fully tears down before next tab click — Body Maps tab did not load after Add-Medication modal close on Maddy in Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: mar_pdf.py used hexval()[2:] without '#'; would have failed for every resident with at least one administered dose in the MAR window — now patched.
PATCH /api/medications/{mid} requires the full MedicationIn body (no MedicationPatch); partial updates not supported. Acceptable for MVP but consider for future.

Backend medication 'administer' uses get_current_user (any role) — fine for staff sign-on-give. Witness check only validates witness_id presence, not that the witness is a different user from the administrator. Consider rejecting if witness_id == administered_by_id.
Body maps DELETE correctly restricted to manager/admin (verified).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all data-testid selectors resolved, one edge-case Body Maps tab load on Maddy, and witness round flow needs witness modal)

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 ; staff@care.local / Staff@123 ; admin@care.local / Admin@123
seed_data_creation: None (relied on existing demo seed: 4 meds incl. Sertraline witness-required, 1 body-map for Leo, 1 prior admin record from yesterday — verified). Tests created TEST_Paracetamol med + a transient body map and cleaned them up via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 backend fully passing including MAR PDF (after color fix). Ofsted readiness returns expected INADEQUATE/29 in dev. Med round groups by slot, sign-given works for non-witness meds; witness-required Sertraline correctly returns 400 from backend but UI does not surface a witness picker. Body maps full flow works on Leo (existing seed mark visible, click-to-mark editor opens, save button present). On Maddy the Body Maps tab failed to load after closing Add Medication modal via Esc — investigate modal teardown.
rca of the issue: MAR PDF 500: reportlab Paragraph parser called with <font color='3a5a40'> (no '#'); hexval() returns '0xRRGGBB' and slice [2:] dropped the leading 0x leaving a bare hex which reportlab's color parser rejects. Fix: prefix '#'. Reproduced via GET /api/residents/{maddy}/mar/pdf?from_date=2026-04-28&to_date=2026-05-05 (window contained yesterday's seeded admin record). Validated 200 + %PDF-1.4 magic bytes after fix.
